mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_execute_log (task_id, queue_id, execute_status, start_time, end_time, result_msg, error_stack, created_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{queueId}, #{executeStatus}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{resultMsg}, #{errorStack}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM task_execute_log ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
